title: Capability
description: Capability token claims. Issued by the kernel CapabilityIssuer at minimal scope; verified at tool-execution time. The token carrier is a server-signed envelope; revocation is enforced by checking tokenId/version at use-time (see spec 11.1).

tokenId.description: Unique id; checked against the revocation store on every use.

version.description: Monotonic; bumped on re-issue, validated at use-time.

subject.description: TaskId or AgentId this capability is bound to.

resource.description: Resource class. tool:<name> is a parameterized form.

deviceId.description: When bound to a specific Local Agent Runner device.

revocable.description: false means a hard-deny capability that can never be minted (uncoverable set).
